nodes.name: Daily 8am ET
nodes.notes: Cron 0 13 * * * UTC = 08:00 America/New_York during EDT (Mar-Nov). For year-round 8am ET, change to your n8n instance timezone or use 0 12 * * * during EST.

nodes.name: Send via SendGrid
nodes.notes: Create an HTTP Header Auth credential called 'SendGrid Bearer' with Name=Authorization Value=Bearer YOUR_SENDGRID_API_KEY. Then re-pick it in the credentials dropdown after import.
